query: SELECT id, primaryDomain, status, totalAssets, totalFindings, overallRiskScore, discoveryCoverageScore, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE status IN ('completed', 'scan_complete') ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 15;
